title: Merger Professionals: Investment bankers primarily assist in the sell-side of mergers and...
summary: Evaluate whether investment bankers work solely on the sell-side or on both sides of M&A transactions.
prompt: Investment bankers primarily assist in the sell-side of mergers and acquisitions.
solution: Investment bankers can work on both the sell-side and buy-side of transactions. On the buy-side, they assist buyers in developing proposals and structuring deals. Conversely, on the sell-side, they help sellers by screening potential buyers and preparing the company for sale, demonstrating their versatility in M&A processes.
